My Story

A little bit about me

I'm a final-year BBA student in Advertising & Public Relations at Jagran Lakecity University, Bhopal — passionate about the intersection of creativity, strategy, and communication.

From crafting AI-powered marketing strategies for Gen Z fragrance brands to developing crisis communication plans for global platforms, I've worked across industries and formats — always with storytelling at the core.

Currently interning at GetVantage, contributing to fintech marketing including launch communication for DDx — an AI-powered underwriting platform.

Every project I take on is driven by curiosity, creativity, and a genuine love for brands that mean something.
